mapper.sql: a.id as id ,a.yonghu_id as yonghuId ,a.shangjia_id as shangjiaId ,a.shangjia_chat_issue_text as shangjiaChatIssueText ,a.issue_time as issueTime ,a.shangjia_chat_reply_text as shangjiaChatReplyText ,a.reply_time as replyTime ,a.zhuangtai_types as zhuangtaiTypes ,a.shangjia_chat_types as shangjiaChatTypes ,a.insert_time as insertTime ,a.create_time as createTime
